zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Oldcastle於1364年出生在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利時，他的父親Richard Oldcastle37歲，母親Alice Pembridge32歲。他於1392年與Alice Pembridge在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年在英國武斯特斯爾易可姆享年40歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾易可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Oldcastle于1364年出生在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利时，他的父亲Richard Oldcastle37岁，母亲Alice Pembridge32岁。他于1392年与Alice Pembridge在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年在英国武斯特斯爾易可姆享年40岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾易可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Oldcastle was born in 1364, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, his father, Richard Oldcastle, was 37 and his mother, Alice Pembridge, was 32. He married Alice Pembridge in 1392, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1404, in Icomb, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Icomb, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Oldcastle est né en 1364, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Oldcastle, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Pembridge, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice Pembridge en 1392, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1404, à Icomb, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Icomb, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.St Giles Fields, London, England: St Giles, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Oldcastle 1364 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Oldcastle 37 und seine Mutter Alice Pembridge 32. Er hat 1392 in England Alice Pembridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1404 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Icomb, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Icomb, Worcestershire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Pembridge nel 1392, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1404, nel Icomb, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Icomb, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Oldcastleが1364年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Richard Oldcastleは37歳，母Alice Pembridgeは32歳であった。1392年にイギリスでAlice Pembridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアイコンブで40歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアイコンブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Oldcastle(이)가 1364년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Oldcastle(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Pembridge(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1392년 영국에서 Alice Pembridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 영국 워스스터실르 이코브에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 이코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Oldcastle nasceu em 1364, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Oldcastle, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Pembridge, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Pembridge em 1392, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1404, em Icomb, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Icomb, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.St Giles Fields, London, England: St Giles, London, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Oldcastle родился в 1364 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Oldcastle было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Pembridge, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Pembridge в 1392 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1404 г. в местности икомб, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности икомб, ворсестиршир, Англия.
